untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market breadth data (advancing vs declining issues count and S&P 500 component analysis) which is not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators lack breadth-specific measures like advance/decline ratio, advance/decline line, or constituent-level advancing/declining counts. vol_ratio_20 is used as a proxy but does not capture true market breadth mechanics as described in the rule.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volume ratio as a breadth proxy, but core signal logic (advancing issues > declining issues, S&P 500 divergence warnings) cannot be accurately expressed without dedicated breadth indicators. Original signal is fundamentally untranslatable to this indicator universe.
